title: Your Emergency Fund Is Quietly Losing $3,400
hook: You built an emergency fund — but where you're keeping it is silently donating thousands to your bank every year.
angle: Emergency funds in regular savings vs high-yield savings accounts — the interest rate gap is enormous and most people never switch.
audience: Anyone who has an emergency fund sitting in a standard bank savings account
key_numbers: $20,000 emergency fund loses $3,400 over 5 years vs HYSA
